title: Success Criteria, Baselines, and Prompt Evals · Prompt Lens: Baseline Prompt
summary: Define and test a support-triage prompt before optimizing its wording. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt baseline prompt increment in a versioned prompt evaluation harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create a minimal baseline prompt before adding scaffolding or examples.
Turn subjective quality goals into observable criteria and representative test cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Build Baseline Prompt evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-baseline-prompt-1lh8jr" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Baseline Prompt into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-baseline-prompt-1lh8jr
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

options.text: Keep the Baseline Prompt artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. This does not resolve repair the baseline prompt defect.
